title: Croptopia: Crop 'n' Refresh!
description: A texture pack meant to bring a refreshing twist to the textures of the crops in Croptopia!
body:
### Hello and Welcome to Crop 'n' Refresh! 
This is a mini passion project that stemmed from my love of minecraft farming. 

# How This Happened:
I've always enjoyed the crops that Croptopia added to minecraft because they were so diverse without the complications of high tech cooking techniques. Unfortunately, I was also painfully aware of how outdated the crop textures always were and no one had taken it upon themselves yet to make an update. SO, that's why I spent a week learning how to make texture packs to make this beauty! 

Originally, I was just going to use this myself but after some careful consideration I figured the community of minecraft farmers (thats you, right? Cuz why would you be here hehe) that share the same love of the craft that I do would appreciate this being openly accessible!

Well anyway... Thank you so much for even taking an interest in my texture. I know its no where near amazing or perfect but at least its a little better right?

[Small edit to say I would love to see how my texture pack is being put into action (Videos, pictures etc,). I'm very happy to see so many people using it and am beyond ecstatic about having 350 downloads. Please share it around as you please.]

### What's going on?!
[I reload this page every few days just to see how its doing and i just watched the downloads LAUNCH from 1400 to 100k!! I'm going to cry.]

## I ONLY TEXTURED THE CROPS AND NOTHING ELSE!
**_I recommend using the_** [Fresh Croptopia Seeds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-croptopia-seeds) **_pack alongside mine in order to keep the consistent variety_**
